---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Say / type '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, iOS 17, Android 14)
- **Microphone:** (e.g. built-in, external USB)
- **Practice Mode:** (e.g. Arena, Interview, Podcast Sim)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem (console errors, network tab info, etc.).
